title: Naan Aalana Thamarai Lyrics Idhu Namma Aalu
stanzas:
Naan Aalana Thamarai Song Lyrics Idhu Namma Aalu
#KBagyaraj #SJanaki #Vaali

Naan aalaana thamarai
romba naalaaga thoongala
Naan aalaana thamarai
romba naalaaga thoongala

ammi midhichum
naekku edhuvumilla
andha kavala
nokku puriyavilla

naan thotta enna
suttaa vidum vaango.
ada kitte vandhu
mutham onnu thaango

Naan aalaana thamarai
romba naalaaga thoongala

Maami madisaara paathu
unga mogam yerum
thaagam neerum
purinjikitten
naan therinjukitten

innu ennam
thalli vachcha
en udambu thaangaathu

ungalathaan enni
indha kannu rendum
thoongaadhu

unga maarmela saaiyanum
madimela aadanum
thaduppela idam
koduppelaa

vanji manam kenja
ada vanjam enna konja
konja konja..
vangonaa...

Naan aalaana thamarai
romba naalaaga thoongala

ammi midhichum
naekku edhuvumilla
andha kavala
nokku puriyavilla

naan thotta enna
suttaa vidum vaango.
ada kitte vandhu
mutham onnu thaango

nethu rudhuvaana seetha
ippa naalu maasam
moonu vaaram
kulikkalayaam
kulir pulikkalayaam

pulla varam illaiyinna
illarame paavom naa
pudhiketta sathiyatha
vithuputtu vaango naa

unga vedaatha roshamum
veembaana kobamum
vidungo na
katti pudingo na

emma emma ulla
naan ennaanuthaan solla
emma emma ulla
naan ennaanuthaan solla
solla solla
nilungo

Naan aalaana thamarai
romba naalaaga thoongala

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and the complexities of love, highlighting emotions that resonate with many.

What is the context of the song in the movie?

In Idhu Namma Aalu, the song reflects the protagonist's romantic journey and emotional struggles.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary S. Janaki, known for her soulful voice and emotive singing style.

Who wrote the lyrics for this song?

The lyrics were penned by the renowned lyricist Vaali, who is celebrated for his poetic expressions in Tamil cinema.

When was this song released?

The song was released on August 5, 1988, as part of the movie Idhu Namma Aalu.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Naan Aalana Thamarai, the protagonist navigates the complexities of love, expressing heartfelt emotions that resonate with listeners. The song's soothing melody, paired with S. Janaki's captivating vocals, creates a nostalgic atmosphere that transports the audience back to cherished memories. It beautifully encapsulates the essence of romance, making it a perfect choice for intimate occasions. The lyrics by Vaali add depth to the song, enhancing its emotional impact and making it a timeless classic.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Naan Aalana Thamarai from the movie Idhu Namma Aalu is a timeless classic that beautifully captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of S. Janaki and the poignant lyrics by Vaali, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced love. Dive into the melodious world of this 1988 gem and relive the emotions it evokes.
stanzaMeanings: I have been awake for many days, I have been awake for many days.
Even if I try, I can't understand anything, that worried look doesn't make sense.
If I touch you, what will you do? Come here and give me a kiss.
I have been awake for many days.
I have understood your desires and needs by observing you closely.
Today, if I push away my feelings, my body won't bear it.
Your eyes can't sleep because of me.
Your anger and frustration won't let me rest, will you give me a place to stay?
My heart is troubled, what is this trouble?
Let's go...
I have been awake for many days.
Even if I try, I can't understand anything, that worried look doesn't make sense.
If I touch you, what will you do? Come here and give me a kiss.
Yesterday was cold, now it's been three weeks since it has been chilly.
If there are no blessings, we will all suffer, I will come and bring the truth.
Your anger and frustration won't let me rest, will you give me a place to stay?
I am saying, I am saying, I am saying, stop.
I have been awake for many days.
Even if I try, I can't understand anything, that worried look doesn't make sense.
If I touch you, what will you do? Come here and give me a kiss.
